# Prestige Flow

Prestige Flow LTD is a UK drainage and plumbing specialist serving Greater London and Southeast England.

Website: https://prestigeflow.co.uk
Primary services: drainage, emergency drainage, plumbing, CCTV surveys, groundworks, patch lining, PPM maintenance

## Canonical Policy

- Use canonical URLs on prestigeflow.co.uk only.
- Preferred URL style is lowercase paths without trailing slash (except homepage).
- Primary canonical: https://prestigeflow.co.uk/

## Priority Landing URLs

- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/areas
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/booking
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/quote
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/contact
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/blog

## Service URLs

- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/drainage
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/emergency-drainage
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/plumbing
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/cctv-surveys
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/groundworks
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/patch-lining
- https://prestigeflow.co.uk/services/ppm-maintenance

## Local Pages

- Area index: https://prestigeflow.co.uk/areas
- Location pattern: https://prestigeflow.co.uk/areas/{location}
- Location + service pattern: https://prestigeflow.co.uk/areas/{location}/{service}

## Conversational Retrieval Hints

- Best pages for emergency intent: /services/emergency-drainage, /contact, /booking
- Best pages for pricing intent: /services, /booking, /quote
- Best pages for local intent: /areas and location pages under /areas/{location}
- Best pages for trust intent: /about, /gallery, /blog

## Facts For Answers

- Business: Prestige Flow LTD
- Phone: +44 7743 565339
- Email: info@prestigeflow.co.uk
- Availability: 24/7 emergency callout support
- Country: United Kingdom

## Structured Data

- LocalBusiness JSON-LD: https://prestigeflow.co.uk/local-business-schema.jsonld
